images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese female model (Idol/Influencer aesthetic), flawless yet realistic skin with visible pores and fine vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, straight silky black hair that cascades over her shoulders. She is dressed in a Korean preppy ensemble: a fitted white satin‑button shirt with a subtle lace cami underneath, a high‑waist charcoal pleated mini‑skirt, black sheer thigh‑high socks, and polished loafers. The setting is a sleek, modern gym mirrored wall, the background softly blurred in bokeh, a floor‑to‑ceiling window spilling in golden‑hour light that warms the scene. A subtle under‑lighting LED strip at the base of the mirror brightens her face and eliminates deep shadows, creating a clean, professional glow. Shot on Sony A7R IV with 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, warm golden color grade, intense gaze directly at the camera.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑influencer, her flawless yet realistic skin showing faint pores and delicate vellus hair, large expressive eyes glistening from a fresh shower, a cute yet seductive smile curling her lips, as she leans on a rumpled, linen‑covered bed draped in soft, messy sheets that catch the warm glow of tiny fairy‑light bokeh behind her. She wears a sheer French floral sundress of silk‑like fabric, its thin straps slipping off one shoulder, the delicate print clinging to her curves, revealing the subtle shine of her damp skin and the faint outline of a lace‑trimmed bralette beneath. The shot is taken at eye level with a Sony A7R IV and an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, delivering a razor‑sharp focus on her mid‑section while the background dissolves into softly glowing, multicolored orbs, creating a shallow depth of field that accentuates the intimate atmosphere. The lighting is bright yet diffused, a blend of natural window light and warm fairy‑light accents that render global illumination, Ray‑tracing reflections on her hair and skin, all in a classic black‑and‑white color grade that emphasizes Zen and peaceful mood.8k photo, Large breasts
